openai-gpt-5-6.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 (Sol/Terra/Luna), brings Sol to Cerebras, teases Sol Ultra for Codex, gets US Commerce Dept approval to lift access restrictions, goes publicly live on July 9, draws benchmark skepticism and safety-card scrutiny ('lying problem') on July 10, then Sol Ultra claims a Cycle Double Cover Conjecture proof via 64 subagents (announced July 10) that mathematicians meet with unverified/unreviewed skepticism

openai-gpt-live.summary: OpenAI ships GPT-Live, a full-duplex voice model for ChatGPT that delegates hard reasoning/search/code to GPT-5.5 in the background

openai-chatgpt-work.summary: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Work, a GPT-5.6-powered agent that plans and executes multi-hour workplace tasks across files, apps and the web, plus a Sites beta and Scheduled Tasks

xai-grok-4-5.summary: xAI launches Grok 4.5 (trained alongside Cursor); day-two reaction centers on trust concerns, day-three independent benchmarks rank it 4th on Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index behind Fable 5/Opus 4.8/GPT-5.5 but best-in-class on cost

anthropic-reflect.summary: Anthropic launches Reflect, a usage-reflection dashboard in Claude settings with monthly recaps, quiet hours and break reminders

google-alphaevolve-ga.summary: AlphaEvolve, Google's Gemini-powered algorithm-discovery agent, moves from private preview to general availability on Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform

meta-muse-spark.summary: Meta ships Muse Spark 1.1, its first paid agentic/coding model with a public API preview, aimed at large-codebase bug fixing, migrations and computer use

mistral-robostral-navigate.summary: Mistral's new robotics division ships Robostral Navigate, a single-camera navigation model beating LiDAR-based systems

anthropic-cowork-mobile.summary: Claude Cowork expands from desktop to web and mobile with cloud-first sessions; usage data shows most sessions aren't software development

google-gemini-omni-flash.summary: Gemini Omni Flash brings conversational, multi-turn video editing to the API

anthropic-claude-science.summary: Anthropic launches Claude Science, an AI workbench for researchers and pharma

anthropic-fable-mythos-restore.summary: Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 return after US export controls are lifted; included access extended a third time to July 19 amid GPT-5.6 Sol competitive pressure

summary.ru: DeepSeek V4 — официальный релиз и пиковая тарификация API
summary.en: DeepSeek V4 — official release and peak-hour API pricing

xai-grok-build-voice.summary: xAI's Grok Build CLI ships frequent changelog updates: v0.2.97 added token-cost tracking, message editing and voice mode for API-key sessions (2026-07-12); v0.2.98 added config.toml auth pinning, /context skill/MCP cost visibility, more reliable Linux middle-click paste, and terminal color/theme reporting in /terminal-setup (2026-07-13)

mistral-leanstral.summary: Mistral releases Leanstral 1.5, an open-source Lean 4 formal-verification model that finds real bugs in code

tencent-hy3.summary: Tencent open-sources Hy3: a 295B MoE (21B active) agent model under Apache 2.0

openai-realtime-2-1.summary: OpenAI ships gpt-realtime-2.1 and -mini: voice agents get at least 25% faster

glm-5-2-economics.summary: "GLM 5.2 and the coming AI margin collapse" — an essay on open models breaking c

meta-muse-image.summary: Meta launches Muse Image (July 7), its first image-gen model; an Instagram-tagging feature draws backlash from SAG-AFTRA/CAA and is pulled July 10

summary.ru: xAI Grok Build CLI — утечка данных, реакция Маска, затем открытие исходного кода и сброс лимитов (2026-07-16)
summary.en: xAI Grok Build CLI — data leak, Musk's response, then open-sourcing the code and resetting usage limits (2026-07-16)

anthropic-claude-code-token-overhead.summary: Systima study finds Claude Code sends ~33k tokens of system prompt/tool schemas before reading the user prompt (~75k with MCP/CLAUDE.md), 4.7x more than OpenCode

summary.ru: Anthropic Claude for Teachers — бесплатный доступ для K-12 учителей
summary.en: Anthropic Claude for Teachers — free K-12 educator access

summary.ru: Google DeepMind GenCeption — видео-модели как универсальное зрение
summary.en: Google DeepMind GenCeption — video models as general-purpose vision

summary.ru: Moonshot AI выпускает Kimi K3 (2.8T MoE, метится в Opus 4.8 по цене Sonnet); на следующий день релиз triggers распродажу техакций и чипмейкеров — новый «момент DeepSeek»
summary.en: Moonshot AI ships Kimi K3 (2.8T MoE, aiming at Opus 4.8 at Sonnet-level pricing); the next day the release triggers a tech and chipmaker stock selloff — a new "DeepSeek moment"

summary.ru: Thinking Machines Lab выпускает Inkling — первую открытую модель (975B MoE) с самонастройкой через Tinker
summary.en: Thinking Machines Lab ships Inkling — its first open model (975B MoE) with self-tuning via Tinker

summary.ru: Google DeepMind и Isomorphic Labs запускают программу Bioresilience — ИИ-доступ для биобезопасности
summary.en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs launch Bioresilience — AI access for biosecurity

summary.ru: Google переименовал NotebookLM в Gemini Notebook, добавив защищённый облачный «компьютер» для выполнения кода по источникам
summary.en: Google renamed NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook, adding a secure cloud "computer" that executes code against a notebook's sources
